Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.summary: April 4, 2023 - the Gilbert Gladiators clash with the Surprise Stingers - live at The Orchard!
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - April 4, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: December 13, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.summary: The Denver Iconics take on the Oklahoma City Punishers in a women's NPL team match.
Video.title: Iconics vs Punishers (Women)

Image.alt: Iconics vs Punishers (Women)
Iconics vs Punishers (Women)
Iconics vs Punishers (Women)

Video.summary: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Video.summary: Watch the opening tie of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) from the CCI Brabourne Stadium! The action features Men's Singles between American Champion Brandon Lane (Mumbai) and Polish #1 Mathias Matysik (Pune), followed by Women's Doubles (Katie Morris & Glauca Lane) and Men's Doubles where Vansh Kapadia and his partner secure Pune's first match win. Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Video.summary: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: In this charity showdown, Pro pickleball players and celebs will represent their alma maters and battle it out for the Picklebowl 2023 trophy. Hosted by Heisman Trophy winner and former NFL player turned pickleball enthusiast, Danny Wuerffel.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Video.summary: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Lily Kordic and Kara Williams take on Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw in this Women's Senior Pro Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Judit Castillo Gargallo face off in the 2023 US Open Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match. A high-stakes showdown of rising stars, intense rallies, and top-tier shotmaking.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Video.summary: Experience the intensity of collegiate pickleball as the University of Arkansas "Hogs" face off against UT Dallas in a high-stakes pool play matchup at the NCPA 2025 Dallas Regional. This "best-of-seven" format showcases the full spectrum of the sport, including gender doubles, singles, and mixed doubles, with teams competing for a prize pool and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis.The match features elite collegiate talent, including Arkansas’ Alison Lee and Yasmine Humbert, who bring high-energy play and powerful forehands to the court. They are met with fierce competition from UT Dallas standouts Chloe Tu, Alex Hayek, and Austin Lee. Watch as the teams battle through momentum shifts and high-speed hand battles at the kitchen line, ultimately leading to a high-pressure sudden death tiebreaker.
Video.title: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Image.alt: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this fierce "Commonwealth Clash" features Virginia Tech taking on their in-state rivals, the University of Virginia (UVA). This pivotal pool play match is part of the fourth regional of the season, with teams vying for crucial seeding and a bid to the National Championship.The episode showcases intense action, starting with Women's Doubles, where UVA's Armelle Worrell and Mia Kim face off against Virginia Tech's Amelia Gaze and Heather Murphy. Later, watch the high-stakes Men's Singles match between Virginia Tech's Cody Miller, known for his reach and strategic placement, and UVA's Braden Cizek, who fights to keep his team in the series. With Virginia Tech leading 3-1 entering the singles match, every point counts.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Video.summary: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced men’s doubles opener.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Video.summary: Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel teams up with pickleball pro Kyle Yates to take on filmmaker Doug Ellin and pro Wes Burrows in this exciting Picklebowl 2022 semifinal. Set on the scenic courts of Sea Island, Georgia, this match blends high-level pickleball with star power and charitable competition. Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
